description: Fix 5 security vulnerabilities in PR #97 auth implementation: superpassword bypass, 2x WebSocket IDOR (column:create + batch column RBAC), session_expired modal wiring, missing RBAC on server functions

history.notes: Feature pipeline initialized — fixing 5 security bugs identified in account-authentication code review (PR #97)

8 criteria with BLOCKER gaps: AC-13/14/15/17 (batch UX component missing entirely), AC-18 (TC-MODAL-01 weak assertion), AC-20 (HTTP 401 path tests missing), AC-21 (focus assertion TC-MODAL-02 missing), AC-22 (draft persistence tests missing)
Returned to Ares — must cover AC-13/14/15/17/18/20/21/22
7 of 8 gaps closed. AC-20 (SEC-MODAL-03) remains: HTTP 401 → triggerSessionExpired path not implemented. Tests bypass missing implementation. Returning to Ares for AC-20 only.

Created src/lib/auth/http-events.ts. Wired QueryClient/MutationCache to dispatch HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED. Wired AuthContext useEffect to listen and call triggerSessionExpired(). Rewrote TC-HTTP401-01/02 to test real interceptor. 787 passing, 8 pre-existing failures unchanged.

AC-20 verified. httpAuthEvents EventTarget + HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED constant bridge QueryClient → AuthContext. TC-HTTP401-01/02 exercise real event bus (dispatch + listener cleanup). 30/30 criteria verified and passing. 787 passing, 8 pre-existing failures unchanged.

Fixed 3 BLOCKER + 2 HIGH findings. BLOCKER-1: QueryCache/MutationCache onSuccess now fires HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED on resolved 401 payloads. BLOCKER-2: denialCounter + lastLogAt capped at 1000 entries with oldest-eviction. BLOCKER-3+HIGH-3: BatchColumnForm rewritten with Tailwind/shadcn; generic errors now show neutral message (no bisection). HIGH-1: ESLint rule tightened to require paired findEffectiveRole+hasMinimumRole (discarded single call no longer passes). 794 passing, 8 pre-existing failures unchanged.

1-prd.revision_notes: v2.0 — addressed Nemesis REVISIONS verdict (4 BLOCKING + 6 MAJOR + 7 MINOR). See decisions.md D11-D26 and prd.md Revision Notes section.

10-prd-alignment.notes: Final re-run. AC-20 verified: httpAuthEvents EventTarget bridges QueryClient → AuthContext. TC-HTTP401-01/02 exercise real event bus. 30/30 criteria verified and passing.

12-review-fixes.summary: Fixed 3 BLOCKER + 2 HIGH findings from Hermes/Cassandra review. Created 2 files (root-provider.test.ts, discarded-findEffectiveRole.ts), modified 9 files. 7 new tests added; 794 total passing, 8 pre-existing failures unchanged. No spec deviations.

checks_failed: prd-challenge.md does not contain a required verdict (expected one of: approved, revisions, rejected)

3-decomposition.summary: 4 phases, 35 tasks across 3 wave-structured phases. Critical path: Phase 1 (Foundation: requireRole/requireServerFnRole helpers) → Phase 2 (Backend: 13 WS handlers + 85 server-fn exports + batch fix + superpassword) → Phase 3 (Frontend: session-expired wiring + draft persistence + batch UX) → Phase 4 (AST guard + full verification). Phase 3 parallelizable with Phase 2 after Phase 1 completes.

5-tech-spec.summary: Centralized authz via two helpers (requireRole for WS, requireServerFnRole for HTTP) replacing the no-op denyIfInsufficientPermission stub; SEC-RBAC-04 enforced by inline ESLint plugin in eslint.config.js. ~13 files create, ~21 modify. Trade-offs: two error shapes coexist (canonical only on the 5 fix sites per GA-ERROR-SHAPE-MIGRATION); column-form-only sessionStorage recovery (per GA-MODAL-RECOVERY-SCOPE) — broader unsaved-state deferred.

8-test-plan.summary: 79 test cases across 15 suites: 24 unit, 31 integration, 5 component/batch-UX, 5 component/draft, 8 ESLint rule self-tests, 5 regression probes, 1 AST assertion. All 30 P0 requirements covered (100%). Primary risk areas: getTableProjectId DB-throw anti-enumeration leak (Apollo MEDIUM-1, 3 dedicated tests), batch all-or-nothing RBAC semantics, and ESLint wrapper-allowlist completeness (gutted-wrapper detection).

9-implementation.summary: Created 19 files (+1 gap-closure-3: http-events.ts), modified 28 files. AC-20 closed: event-bus pattern implemented — httpAuthEvents (EventTarget) in src/lib/auth/http-events.ts; QueryClient/MutationCache fire HTTP_UNAUTHORIZED on any 401; AuthContext useEffect listens and calls triggerSessionExpired(). TC-HTTP401-01/02 rewritten to exercise real interceptor (dispatch event, assert listener fires; remove listener, assert no double-fire). 787 passing, 8 pre-existing failures unchanged. All 22 ACs now fully covered.
